## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Exec and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO progress, and new industry focus areas.](https://fathom.video/share/xn74bxCxHNwyRTQEKvuLVKKWZvDrKzKB?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Megan Dickey introduced as new director for the Exec account, bringing journalism and content expertise](https://fathom.video/share/xn74bxCxHNwyRTQEKvuLVKKWZvDrKzKB?tab=summary&timestamp=75.0)
  - [Strong SEO performance with traffic spikes; aiming for 100 daily visitors as next milestone](https://fathom.video/share/xn74bxCxHNwyRTQEKvuLVKKWZvDrKzKB?tab=summary&timestamp=664.0)
  - [Expanding content focus to auto dealer and insurance industries, leveraging AI role-play scenarios](https://fathom.video/share/xn74bxCxHNwyRTQEKvuLVKKWZvDrKzKB?tab=summary&timestamp=354.0)
  - [Exec developing product-integrated landing pages for specific use cases (e.g., auto dealer onboarding)](https://fathom.video/share/xn74bxCxHNwyRTQEKvuLVKKWZvDrKzKB?tab=summary&timestamp=855.0)

## Topics

### Team Changes and Introductions

  - [Megan Dickey joining as new director on the Exec account](https://fathom.video/share/xn74bxCxHNwyRTQEKvuLVKKWZvDrKzKB?tab=summary&timestamp=75.0)
  - [Background: 15 years in journalism (TechCrunch, Business Insider, Axios), Chief Content Officer at Backstage Capital](https://fathom.video/share/xn74bxCxHNwyRTQEKvuLVKKWZvDrKzKB?tab=summary&timestamp=107.0)
  - [Focus on content strategy and meeting Exec's goals](https://fathom.video/share/xn74bxCxHNwyRTQEKvuLVKKWZvDrKzKB?tab=summary&timestamp=126.0)

### Content Management System (Contentful) Access

  - [GrowthX team has access to articles and series pages in Contentful](https://fathom.video/share/xn74bxCxHNwyRTQEKvuLVKKWZvDrKzKB?tab=summary&timestamp=266.0)
  - [Other website pages published directly in code (React, no CMS)](https://fathom.video/share/xn74bxCxHNwyRTQEKvuLVKKWZvDrKzKB?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Sean to assist with meta changes for non-Contentful pages if needed](https://fathom.video/share/xn74bxCxHNwyRTQEKvuLVKKWZvDrKzKB?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)

### New Industry Focus: Auto Dealers and Insurance

  - [Expanding content clusters to auto dealer and insurance industries](https://fathom.video/share/xn74bxCxHNwyRTQEKvuLVKKWZvDrKzKB?tab=summary&timestamp=354.0)
  - [High search volume for generic terms around sales training in both sectors](https://fathom.video/share/xn74bxCxHNwyRTQEKvuLVKKWZvDrKzKB?tab=summary&timestamp=368.0)
  - [Developing AI role-play scenarios for various situations (20 initial topics)](https://fathom.video/share/xn74bxCxHNwyRTQEKvuLVKKWZvDrKzKB?tab=summary&timestamp=403.0)
  - [Sean provided additional context docs for auto industry terminology and training requirements](https://fathom.video/share/xn74bxCxHNwyRTQEKvuLVKKWZvDrKzKB?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)

### SEO and Analytics Performance

  - [Positive traffic trends with recent spikes](https://fathom.video/share/xn74bxCxHNwyRTQEKvuLVKKWZvDrKzKB?tab=summary&timestamp=664.0)
  - [Goal: reach average of 100 daily visitors](https://fathom.video/share/xn74bxCxHNwyRTQEKvuLVKKWZvDrKzKB?tab=summary&timestamp=674.0)
  - [Top performers: LLM referrals, stats page, "learn" section](https://fathom.video/share/xn74bxCxHNwyRTQEKvuLVKKWZvDrKzKB?tab=summary&timestamp=696.0)
  - [New keywords gaining traction: medical role play, role play scenarios, role play platforms](https://fathom.video/share/xn74bxCxHNwyRTQEKvuLVKKWZvDrKzKB?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)

### Future Product and Marketing Integration

  - [Developing specific landing pages for industry use cases (e.g., auto dealers)](https://fathom.video/share/xn74bxCxHNwyRTQEKvuLVKKWZvDrKzKB?tab=summary&timestamp=855.0)
  - [Plan to create direct product engagement from landing pages ("create a role play" CTA)](https://fathom.video/share/xn74bxCxHNwyRTQEKvuLVKKWZvDrKzKB?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)
  - [Potential use of sidebar in Contentful for easy role-play creation from blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/xn74bxCxHNwyRTQEKvuLVKKWZvDrKzKB?tab=summary&timestamp=935.0)

## Next Steps
